subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-10-23
subcodes.first_line: From the circumstances, as reported, we surmised that because Aqa Abu'l-Qasim-i-Hamadani had previously been with Baha'u'llah and had also set out on a journey... I have now been for some time in these regions.
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون در راه سوارهائی که برای حفاظت همراه ایشان بوده‌اند اورا زخمی کرده اموالش را می برند
